name: Activepieces
description: Open-source workflow automation platform with MCP server, 280+ connectors, and REST API. Self-hostable alternative to Zapier for building AI-triggered automations.

skills.name: Flow Builder
skills.description: Build multi-step automation flows visually with 280+ app connectors and conditional logic

skills.name: MCP Expose
skills.description: Expose any Activepieces flow as an MCP tool callable from Claude and AI agents

skills.name: REST Trigger
skills.description: Trigger flows via REST API and receive structured output from completed runs

skills.name: Self-Hostable
skills.description: Deploy on your own infrastructure with Docker — full data ownership and open-source license

skills.name: Webhook Events
skills.description: Receive webhooks from any app and route them into automation flows in real time
